workiqQueriesRun: Give me a comprehensive analysis of ALL my M365 activity from the past 7 days across email, meetings, Teams chats, and documents. For each source, list: the most frequent/recurring activities, estimated time spent, key participants (by role not name), and any repeating patterns or workflows. Include specific examples of recurring email types, meeting types, chat topics, and document types. Be thorough — I need at least 15 distinct activity patterns.

Looking across my entire team's M365 activity from the past 7 days: What tasks do multiple people do independently that could be standardized? What workflows repeat across people (e.g., someone gets an email, schedules a meeting, then creates a doc)? What are the biggest time sinks that affect 3 or more people? Focus on patterns that span multiple M365 sources and involve multiple participants.

signals.title: Work Tracker Notification Triage
signals.rawExcerpt: Tasks, Requirements, Features, Epics for Evals, Coverage, Jailing, Thresholds — ~5-8 min per item x many items/day -> ~2.5-3.5 hrs/week

signals.title: Eval Strategy and Process Threads
signals.rawExcerpt: Clarifying eval workflows, CRM tracking, decks, playbooks — e.g. 'Customer donated evals added Playbook' thread — ~45-60 min/week

signals.title: Program X Camp Logistics and Participation Emails
signals.rawExcerpt: Schedules, reminders, in-person logistics — 'Tiger Team – Casual get-together', 'Program X Camp' — ~20 min/week

signals.title: File-Share Notifications (Loop, SharePoint)
signals.rawExcerpt: Shared eval docs, dashboards, templates — 'Response quality evaluations from the Enterprise Client C product team' — ~30-45 min/week

signals.title: Security and Compliance Alerts
signals.rawExcerpt: Purview DLP alert for sensitive data — 'Action Required: File Blocked – sensitive data' — ~10-15 min event-driven

signals.title: Broadcast / FYI Newsletters
signals.rawExcerpt: 'Microsoft Daily Digest', 'Copilot New Public Roadmap Items' — ~15-20 min/week

signals.title: Long-Form Immersive Program (Program X Camp)
signals.rawExcerpt: Program X Camp (multi-hour) — Duration ~9 hrs; attendance logged

signals.title: V-Team / Cross-Org Syncs
signals.rawExcerpt: Evaluation alignment, Services Org / ISV / DA Evals — Weekly Project Alpha v-Team — ~1-1.5 hrs/week

signals.title: Customer / Partner Eval Deep Dives
signals.rawExcerpt: Scoped eval walkthroughs, tool grounding discussions — 20-30 min eval deep dive planning in chat — ~1 hr/week

signals.title: Eval Tooling Debugging and Guidance
signals.rawExcerpt: CLI Evals, tool-call accuracy, telemetry gaps — CLI Eval Private Preview thread — ~2 hrs/week

signals.title: Event-Driven Collaboration (Program X Camp Chats)
signals.rawExcerpt: Program X Camp standups, vibe-coding discussions — ~3-4 hrs/week overlaps with meetings

signals.title: Content Planning and Speaking Alignment
signals.rawExcerpt: TechCon planning with manager & peers — ~30-45 min/week

signals.title: Triage and Ownership Resolution
signals.rawExcerpt: Duplicate customer asks, ownership confirmation — Eval DRI/TPM triage threads — ~45 min/week

signals.title: Knowledge Sharing and Link Distribution
signals.rawExcerpt: Docs, Learn links, SharePoint, forms — Copilot Studio eval guidance links — ~30 min/week

signals.title: Informal Social / Morale Chats
signals.rawExcerpt: St. Patrick's Day Tiger Team thread — ~10-15 min/week

signals.title: Eval Frameworks and Templates Creation
signals.rawExcerpt: Agent Eval Sets template, Trajectory evaluation guide (Status Update) — ~3-4 hrs/week

signals.title: Meta-Analysis Dashboards (Skilluminator)
signals.rawExcerpt: Dashboards analyzing M365 patterns — Skilluminator dashboard (Cycle 3) — ~1-1.5 hrs/week

signals.title: Loop-Based Live Collaboration
signals.rawExcerpt: Meeting notes, project kickoffs, hack planning — Multiple Loop files shared/edited this week — ~2 hrs/week

signals.title: Hackathon and Prototype Artifacts
signals.rawExcerpt: Hack ideas, repos, scripts, prototypes — Hackathon planning doc, setup-devbox.sh — ~2-3 hrs/week

signals.title: Customer Signal Synthesis
signals.rawExcerpt: 'Services Org Customer Signals for Planning' — Aggregating customer feedback into planning inputs — ~45-60 min/week

signals.title: Action Items Capture-Assign-Publish Loop
signals.rawExcerpt: Same 'capture -> assign -> publish' loop happening in at least three modalities: meeting recap email, meeting transcript/tasks, Teams follow-ups & tagging

signals.title: Link Chasing and Access Management
signals.rawExcerpt: 'send me the link direct? don't have access to chat history...' plus 'Verify that all Program X team members have access to the new SharePoint Solution Library and resolve access problems'

signals.title: Incident Documentation Update Workflow
signals.rawExcerpt: Meeting transcript shows live coordination around an incident impacting eval tooling — updating README/docs, pulling others into incident/ICM, coordinating stakeholder updates

signals.title: Daily Prep / Personal Summary Automation
signals.rawExcerpt: Repeated automated outputs: 'Help me prepare for my day' from Workflows, producing a generated SharePoint page — if multiple team members doing similar daily prep, standardization can reduce duplicated set-up

signals.title: Email-to-Meeting-to-Deck-to-Followup Chain
signals.rawExcerpt: A recap email references a meeting review, points to a content deck, and then enumerates follow-up tasks with owners — repeated 'discuss -> deck -> recap -> action list -> track' operating rhythm
